name: pinwork
title: Pinwork
description: Manage your tasks with Pinwork - a GTD-inspired task management app
author: adapting.tech

preferences.name: showCompletedTasks
preferences.title: Show Completed Tasks
preferences.label: Show completed tasks
preferences.description: Include recently completed tasks in list views

commands.name: show-inbox
commands.title: Show Inbox
commands.subtitle: Pinwork
commands.description: View unscheduled tasks in your inbox

commands.name: show-next
commands.title: Show Next
commands.subtitle: Pinwork
commands.description: View upcoming tasks for the next few days

commands.name: quick-add
commands.title: Quick Add Task
commands.subtitle: Pinwork
commands.description: Add a new task using natural language

commands.name: show-projects
commands.title: Show Projects
commands.subtitle: Pinwork
commands.description: View all projects and their tasks

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
